category_sources: Official CourtBouillon WeasyPrint page describes creating PDF documents from web technologies.
source_facts.description says WeasyPrint converts HTML to PDF.
display_name_sources: Official CourtBouillon page uses the WeasyPrint name.
Official GitHub repository is named Kozea/WeasyPrint.
docs_sources: Official CourtBouillon page links to WeasyPrint documentation.
Official GitHub README lists Documentation as doc.courtbouillon.org/weasyprint.
repo_sources: Official CourtBouillon WeasyPrint page links Code to the GitHub repository.
Official GitHub README lists Code, issues, tests at github.com/Kozea/WeasyPrint.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include css, python, html, pdf, converter, and weasyprint.
source_facts.description identifies HTML to PDF conversion.
